title: AltsDetector
description: A minecraft plugin that allows you to view a player's alternate accounts
body:
**AltsDetector**

AltsDetector is a high quality /alts plugin that lets you view a players alt accounts

Whats the point of AltsDetector?

- Find out if a player is ban evading
- View the alternate accounts of a player

Config
The config has 2 options:
AutoBan: Automatically bans people that log on with a banned account linked to their account, Off by default

Hide IP: Hides a player's ip adress, this is on by default
